label: Internal SMTP discovery and relay check
description: Aggregate SMTP check for internal mail exposure. It runs Nmap service detection and available SMTP NSE scripts for command discovery, user enumeration behavior, open relay checks, and known Exim/Sendmail SMTP vulnerabilities. SPF policy review runs only when an explicit domain is provided.

parameters.name: spf_domain
parameters.label: SPF domain
parameters.description: Optional mail domain to use for SPF TXT-policy review. Leave blank to run SMTP discovery without SPF analysis.
